name: Crab Meat Alma
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a heavy saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add the green onions and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in the flour, then cook for an additional minute to remove any raw flour taste.
4. Gradually whisk in the light cream, stirring constantly until smooth.
5. Reduce the heat to low and continue cooking until the sauce thickens and coats the back of a spoon, about 10-15 minutes.
6. Add the grated Swiss cheese, stirring continuously until melted and incorporated into the sauce.
7. Stir in the dry sherry, parsley, cayenne, and salt to taste.
8. Fold in the crab meat until evenly distributed throughout the mixture.
9. Cook for an additional 5 minutes over low heat to ensure all ingredients are well combined and heated through.
10. Serve hot on French bread or in patty shells.
~~~ Chester Foster
